name: phase-6-codex-live-activity-controls

checklist.summary: User confirmed the 26-item Phase 6 checklist and requested todolist generation.

notes: Product clarification completed before archival.
Primary goal is comprehensive live Codex activity visibility; interactive human continuation is secondary.
Human approval supports allow once, allow matching activity for the current Codex runtime session, and reject.
Cancellation retains activity and file changes and never implies rollback.
Agent-originated interaction requests remain fail-closed terminal outcomes.
Technical review confirmed app-server support for item events, acceptForSession, user-input answers, turn interrupt, and thread read with turns.
Checklist contains 26 checks with stable identifiers from CHK-001 through CHK-028; CHK-011 and CHK-023 were removed, and the checklist is awaiting user confirmation.
Recommended delivery split: Phase 6A live activity visibility, Phase 6B human-in-the-loop controls, and Phase 6C recovery and production hardening.
Checklist defines independent scope, execution steps, pass criteria, and human confirmation records for Phase 6A, Phase 6B, and Phase 6C while preserving the remaining stable identifiers.

Official app-server documentation confirms accept and acceptForSession for command/file approvals, but does not expose a native approval-cache list or revoke API and does not guarantee VO conversation-scoped lifetime.
Technical clarification resolved: keep protocol accept and acceptForSession as separate choices.
Runtime-session approval is not presented as VO conversation-scoped and has no manual revoke or reset-clear promise.
CHK-011 and CHK-023 were removed because the native app-server API cannot guarantee those behaviors.
Checklist confirmed by the user on 2026-06-09 and recorded in checklist.md.
Todolist created with 18 traceable tasks across independently verifiable Phase 6A, Phase 6B, and Phase 6C increments.
Test condition corrected by the user: real Codex validation must set _VO_INT=1 and confirm /api/license reports demo=false.
Phase 6 implementation completed across activity events, persistence, interactive approval/input, cancellation, refresh recovery, restart reconciliation, and active-conversation navigation.
Deterministic HTTP E2E passed, including allow once, busy navigation metadata, cancellation, and pending approval invalidation after service restart.
Browser E2E passed for activity cards, approval continuation, runtime-session approval labeling, refresh recovery, and cancellation messaging.
Real Codex read-only regression passed with _VO_INT=1 and demo=false; thread, turn, command progress, terminal state, and final reply were observed with no modified files.
Review parser regressions passed 16/16 and 85/85; project CRUD regression passed 5/5.
confirmed.tested remains false pending user acceptance and live OpenClaw/Hermes regression in an available gateway environment.
